name: Broiled Salmon with Lime & Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cilantro, garlic, lime juice, olive oil, and salt in a bowl. Reserve 2 tablespoons. Pour the remainder over fish on a plate. Let stand, covered, for 10 minutes.
2. Spray broiler rack with nonstick cooking spray. Place salmon on the rack. Brush each steak with 1 tablespoon of marinade.
3. Broil 6 inches from heat for 3-4 minutes. Turn steaks over. Brush remaining tablespoon of marinade on each steak. Continue broiling for another 3 minutes or until cooked through.
